summary: A clip of daytime dashcam footage from a traffic stop. An officer in tactical gear, face blurred, approaches the rear of a white Dodge Grand Caravan with Florida plates that has stopped on a tree-lined residential street, its brake lights lit. Later footage shows a wider view of the street with a vehicle pulled onto a grassy area and people standing nearby.

script.scene: An officer in tactical gear approaches the rear of a white Dodge minivan on a residential street.
A wider view of the street shows a vehicle on a grassy area with people standing nearby.
